relationships: ber:Takamra n Sami tebda la d-tettixir seg umkan-nnes
ber:Sami yella la yetteddu seg temnaḍt ɣer tayeḍ deg Maṣer, yettqellib ɣef teɣtas
ber:Sami la itteddu ad d-yas ad iɣer deg uɣerbaz-a
ber:Tasewlaft n Sami tebda la d-tettixir seg umkan-nnes
ber:D Sami ay yellan la d-yettmahal ɣef uxxam
ber:Mennad iger tamawt dakken tella la as-tɣelli tbatrit i usawal-nnes
ber:Cukkteɣ dakken yikayaden la ssexṣaren assegmi
ber:Tasewlaft n Sami tebda la d-tettixir seg udeg-nnes
ber:Asakal-nni yella la yetteddu ad yeqleɛ imir-nni kan
ber:Ulac ccekk dakken yella kra ay la ssefrayen ad t-gen
ber:Iban kan la tettxemmimed dakken nekk d tameslubt
ber:Ulac ccek dakken Tom ad yili la isett tura
ber:Sami yella la yetteddu ad yegzem asawal
ber:Takamra n Sami tebda la d-tettixir seg udeg-nnes
ber:Ulac ccekk dakken yella kra ay la ssefrayent ad t-gent
ber:Yenna-d dakken la yettḥassa i yiman-is yejhed
ber:Ulac ccekk dakken yiwet seg-sent la yeskerkis
ber:Asawal n Sami ur la yetteddu ara
